codeSystems.name: CarePlanActivityStatus
codeSystems.title: CarePlanActivityStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes that reflect the current state of a care plan activity within its overall life cycle.

codeSystems.name: EpisodeOfCareStatus
codeSystems.title: EpisodeOfCareStatus
codeSystems.description: The status of the episode of care.

codeSystems.name: GoalLifecycleStatus
codeSystems.title: GoalLifecycleStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes that reflect the current state of a goal and whether the goal is still being targeted.

codeSystems.name: RequestIntent
codeSystems.title: RequestIntent
codeSystems.description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a request.

codeSystems.name: RequestStatus
codeSystems.title: RequestStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a request.

codeSystems.name: ResourceType
codeSystems.title: ResourceType
codeSystems.description: One of the resource types defined as part of this version of FHIR.

codeSystems.name: SNOMED_CT
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT (all versions)
codeSystems.description: SNOMED CT is the most comprehensive and precise clinical health terminology product in the world, owned and distributed around the world by The International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO).

codeSystems.name: DiagnosisRole
codeSystems.title: Diagnosis Role
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to express the role of a diagnosis on the Encounter or EpisodeOfCare record.

codeSystems.name: EpisodeOfCareType
codeSystems.title: Episode of care type
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to express the usage type of an EpisodeOfCare record.

codeSystems.name: GoalAchievementStatus
codeSystems.title: Goal achievement status
codeSystems.description: Describes the progression, or lack thereof, towards the goal against the target.

codeSystems.name: GoalPriority
codeSystems.title: Goal priority
codeSystems.description: Indicates the level of importance associated with reaching or sustaining a goal.

codeSystems.name: OnkoTherapyGoalType
codeSystems.title: Onkologische Therapieziel-Art
codeSystems.description: Codiert die Art eines onkologischen Therapieziels (Heilung, Lebensverlängerung, Symptomkontrolle, Lebensqualität, gemeinsame Entscheidung).

codeSystems.name: OnkoTherapyIntent
codeSystems.title: Onkologische Therapieintention
codeSystems.description: Codiert die Intention einer onkologischen Therapielinie oder eines Behandlungsabschnitts (kurativ, neoadjuvant, adjuvant, palliativ, Erhaltung, supportiv).
